children.label: A
children.text: return or repatriate Native American cultural items to Indian tribes, Native Hawaiian organizations, or individuals, and

children.label: B
children.text: enter into any other agreement with the consent of the culturally affiliated tribe or organization as to the disposition of, or control over, items covered by this chapter;
delay actions on repatriation requests that are pending on ;November 16, 1990
deny or otherwise affect access to any court;
limit any procedural or substantive right which may otherwise be secured to individuals or Indian tribes or Native Hawaiian organizations; or
limit the application of any State or Federal law pertaining to theft or stolen property.
